device_service_tag.description: Service tag of the device. This option is mutually exclusive with I(device_id).

device_id.description: ID of the device. This option is mutually exclusive with I(device_service_tag).

enable_nic.description: Enable or disable Network Interface Card (NIC) configuration of the device. This option is not applicable to I/O Module.

delay.description: The time in seconds, after which settings are applied. This option is applicable only for Chassis.

dellemc.openmanage.ome_devices.short_description: Perform device-specific operations on target devices
dellemc.openmanage.ome_devices.description: Perform device-specific operations such as refresh inventory, clear iDRAC job queue, and reset iDRAC from OpenManage Enterprise.

device_service_tags.description: Service tag of the target devices. This is mutually exclusive with I(device_ids).

device_ids.description: IDs of the target devices. This is mutually exclusive with I(device_service_tags).

state.description: C(present) Allows to perform the I(device_action) on the target devices.
